style: fantasy RPG game icon, hand-painted, bold shapes, warm palette, clean edges, centered on solid white background, no text, no border, no frame, no outline, no circular badge
negativePrompt: text, words, letters, numbers, modern, sci-fi, photo-realistic, blurry, multiple objects, complex background, border, frame, outline, badge, button, circle around object, rounded rectangle
